title: Feature request: Add production color frame for production sessions
author: igor2x
body_snippet:
I have been using mRemoteNG for years. I currently use the latest stable mRemoteNG v1.76.20 on Windows 10.

Few days ago I created quite a bit mess... I was testing something on my remote SSH test computer, got a phone call from end-user and switched to production SSH computer. Then got somehow distracted and continue testing on production session. Mess...

This is how I came to this feature request. In _DBeaver database management tool_ there is very simple and efficient solution. For each ...

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: this already take into action and i am thinking to release this soon, for a feature it will be posible to tag connectiosn and set coloring any of user choice to show up, hope that helps

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: its need a bit more work to make it to work properly, curently its does border of selected color but covers with internal container, need to think to add margins perhaps...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `0d23eec0` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Feature request: Add production color frame for production s

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Color frame/border feature for tagging connections is actively in development by maintainer with visual proof, just needs margin fix to prevent container overlap.
Approach: Add configurable margin/padding around the connection container so the colored border frame is visible without being covered by the internal session panel
